slots.title: Designing the next premium electric experience.
slots.subtitle: How Neue Klasse can redefine the relationship between vehicle, driver and brand.

slots.action-title: Electric performance is becoming expected. Experience is becoming the differentiator.
slots.p1-body: Range, charging speed and acceleration are converging across the premium field and are increasingly easy for competitors to match.
slots.p2-body: Premium customers evaluate the entire ownership journey, not a single drive. Every interaction sets the price of trust.
slots.p3-body: App, account and charging interactions now shape how the car itself is perceived. A weak digital moment discounts the metal.
slots.p4-body: Neue Klasse lets BMW design the experience as one coherent system, before the architecture and the ecosystem are locked.
slots.conclusion: Treat Neue Klasse as an integrated experience platform, not only as a new vehicle architecture.
slots.source: BMW Group product strategy, working hypothesis. Illustrative framing.

slots.action-title: The competitive benchmark is moving from drivetrain to the whole experience.
Premium customers expect the vehicle to fit naturally into their lives.
slots.d2-items: Intuitive setup|Fast, consistent interfaces|Seamless phone integration|Useful personalization
slots.source: Synthesis of premium EV customer research themes. Illustrative.

slots.action-title: Customers do not experience departments. They experience one brand.
slots.intro: The ownership journey spans eleven stages owned by different teams, systems and partners. Each handover is a seam where the premium experience can break.
slots.note: Every dashed line is a handover. Inconsistencies between channels are where premium quietly leaks away.

slots.action-title: The experience needs a clear operating system, expressed as six principles.
slots.p1-body: Remove steps, defaults and decisions the customer should never have to make.
slots.p2-body: Spend deliberate craft on the moments that carry the brand, not on every screen.
slots.p3-body: When complexity cannot be removed, explain it clearly instead of hiding it.
slots.p4-body: Adapt to the driver in the background; never turn personalization into more settings.
slots.p5-body: Treat the car, the app and the retail moment as one continuous surface.
slots.p6-body: Make impact legible so sustainability is felt as value, not as a claim.

slots.action-title: One vehicle. One ecosystem. One continuous relationship.
slots.note: Each layer should feel coordinated around the customer, not independently optimized by the team that owns it.

slots.action-title: Make the first 14 days feel exceptional.
slots.intro: Onboarding is where the premium promise is either proven or quietly broken. A guided journey replaces a long feature tutorial with contextual learning, paced over two weeks.
slots.r1-q: Is everything ready before I collect the car?
slots.r2-q: What do I need to know to drive away confident?
slots.r3-q: Is my phone fully connected to the car?
slots.r4-q: How and where will I charge day to day?
slots.r5-touch: Features introduced in the moment of use
slots.r5-q: What can this car do that I have not found yet?
slots.r6-q: Is anyone paying attention to how it is going?

slots.action-title: Turn charging from a source of uncertainty into a premium service.
slots.bad-1: Range estimates that the driver learns not to trust
slots.bad-2: Stations that may be broken, blocked or occupied on arrival
slots.bad-4: Home and public charging set up as separate problems
slots.good-1: Route-aware planning with realistic, honest range
slots.good-2: Reliability signals and live status before you arrive
slots.good-3: Clear pricing and one account across networks
slots.good-4: Guided home and public setup as one continuous flow
slots.good-5: Proactive support and a fallback the moment a charge fails

slots.action-title: Personalization should reduce effort, not add settings.
slots.useful-body: Learns recurring routines and acts in the background, so the car arrives at the right state without being asked.
slots.over-body: Surfaces every option as a new toggle, pushing the work of configuration back onto the driver.

slots.action-title: Make sustainability tangible, without becoming moralizing.
slots.r1-cust: Pride and confidence in what the car is made of
slots.r2-cust: Trust in longevity and residual value
slots.r4-cust: Lower cost of ownership over time
slots.source: Sustainability levers, customer and business view. Illustrative.

slots.action-title: Not every opportunity should be built at once.
slots.points: 30,80,Pre-delivery setup || 58,86,Charging reliability || 22,68,Simplified onboarding || 28,48,Contextual education || 46,60,Personalized routines || 38,42,Battery-health transparency || 48,28,Sustainability dashboard || 54,52,Proactive service comms || 66,40,Ownership upgrades
slots.c3-body: Plotted on customer value vs implementation complexity. Brand differentiation, cross-functional dependency and time to impact weight the position within each quadrant.

slots.action-title: Win the first year through three connected experiences.
slots.i1-body: A guided digital and physical onboarding journey across the first 14 days, replacing the feature tutorial with learning in context.
slots.i2-body: A reliability layer for charging focused on clarity, trust and proactive assistance, from route planning to recovery when a charge fails.
slots.i3-body: A lightweight personalization system that learns recurring routines and removes friction in the background, without adding settings.
slots.reinforce: Welcome teaches the routines that Rhythm then automates; Charge Confidence is the daily proof that the system works. Each makes the next feel effortless.

slots.action-title: A coherent experience requires shared ownership.
slots.recos-label: What it takes to work as one
slots.rec1: Shared experience principles across every function
slots.rec2: Clear ownership by journey, not by department
slots.rec4: Continuous customer feedback into the roadmap
slots.rec5: A single experience roadmap, not parallel plans

slots.action-title: Design the ecosystem in parallel with the vehicle.

slots.closing-line: The next BMW should feel advanced before the customer starts driving.
slots.sub: Neue Klasse is the opportunity to create a premium electric experience that feels coherent, confident and unmistakably BMW.
